_about: Top-level machine-readable manifest of the femis skill — the entry point for agents/humans to discover the router, references, runnable scripts, and the eval set without reading every file. CI (the hygiene job) asserts the script file-set here and the reference count match the tree.
name: femis
summary: Governance/decision layer that turns an AI coding agent into a disciplined finite-element analyst across many solvers. It governs engineering claims; it does not drive solvers or sign off designs.

scripts.summary: Grid Convergence Index (GCI) — Roache / ASME V&V 20 / Celik et al. 2008.
Explicit-dynamics energy-quality gate (hourglass / energy balance / KE).
Modal Assurance Criterion (MAC) and Coordinate MAC (COMAC) for mode-shape correlation.
Generate and check provenance-tag coverage across references/*.md.
ASTM E1049 rainflow cycle counting for fatigue post-processing.
Static validator + scoring harness for the activation/behavior eval set, including optional numeric ground-truth checks.
Optional live A/B harness (skill-on vs skill-off) over evals/prompts.json; measures behavior change via the Anthropic SDK or any agent callable.
Consistent-units and 1g mass sanity checks for FE models.
y+ first-cell-height estimator for wall-bounded CFD meshing.
